title: Comprehensive Inventory of Programs, Services, Interventions, & Community Reinvestments (PSI) Matrix FY25 Report

abstracts.abstract: Report of the Massachusetts Sheriffs' Association (pursuant to line items 8910-8200, 8910-0145, 8910-8300, 8910-8400, 8910-0619, 8910-0108, 8910-0102, 8910-0110, 8910-0107, 8910-8500, 8910-8600, 8910-8700, 8910-8800 and 8910-0105 of Section 2 of Chapter 9 of the Acts of 2025) submitting its Comprehensive Inventory of Programs, Services, Interventions and Community Reinvestments (PSI) Matrix for calendar year 2025
